offensive_abilities.name: Weapon Mount
offensive_abilities.text: This vehicle has one rear weapon mount that can be equipped with a ranged weapon. At purchase, this weapon mount is empty. Installing or uninstalling a weapon into this mount requires 10 minutes, a successful DC 20 Crafting check, as well as an appropriate weapon to install.

offensive_abilities.name: Wind-Up
offensive_abilities.text: 10 minutes of wind-up, 1 hour of operational time, DC 20, standby

statistics.space: 10 feet long, 10 feet wide, 10 feet high

stat_block.text: Slow but steady, an armored carriage combines clockwork with a protective hull for a safe and comfortable ride.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.
